message:
fix: sync plugin.json version to 0.47.1

The plugin.json was left at 0.47.0 while all other version files
were bumped to 0.47.1, causing CI failures on all PRs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
   "name": "beads",
   "description": "AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.",
-  "version": "0.47.0",
+  "version": "0.47.1",
   "author": {
     "name": "Steve Yegge",
     "url": "https://github.com/steveyegge"
